authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(3) — Almanor Lake tributaries (Lassen, Plumas and Shasta Cos.)
sources.quotedText: (3) Almanor Lake tributaries (Lassen, Plumas and Shasta Cos.) upstream to the first lake. Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sept. 30. 5 trout

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (updated June 1, 2026)
CCR T14 §5.85 — Trout (statewide default bag and possession limits)
sources.quotedText: five-trout daily bag limit and ten-trout possession limit

sources.title: California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon — CDFW
sources.quotedText: Region: R2; County: Plumas; Release Water: Feather River North Fork, Almanor; Species: Rainbow Trout; Release Size: Catchable; Release Program: Put and Take; Release Month Range: May-October

parameters.note: Applies to tributary streams flowing into Lake Almanor, from their mouths upstream to the first lake on each stream.

regulations.humanSummary: Open Saturday preceding Memorial Day through September 30, upstream to the first lake on each tributary
regulations.verbatimText: Almanor Lake tributaries (Lassen, Plumas and Shasta Cos.) upstream to the first lake. Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sept. 30.

parameters.counting_rule: Daily limit of 5 trout per §7.50(b)(3); possession limit of 10 (twice the daily limit) per the statewide default trout possession rule in §5.85.

regulations.humanSummary: Daily bag limit of 5 trout, possession limit of 10

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

stockingSchedule.note: CDFW's 2026 Provisional Stocking Document lists catchable Rainbow Trout stocked into 'Feather River North Fork, Almanor' (Plumas Co.) — the North Fork Feather River reach feeding Lake Almanor near Chester — under the Put and Take program, release month range May-October. This is CDFW's provisional plan for 2026, not a guaranteed annual constant.
